Title: Ground conditions worse than expected
Description: Ground investigation report indicates possible variability in bearing capacity
MitigationActions: Additional boreholes before excavation; piling design contingency
ContingencyPlan: Switch to piled foundations if CBR < target

Title: Adverse weather during superstructure
Description: Winter working may impact concrete pouring and crane operations
MitigationActions: Programme weather-sensitive works Apr–Sep; temporary enclosures

Title: Specialist subcontractor insolvency
Description: Key MEP subcontractor financial viability concerns
MitigationActions: Parent company guarantee; performance bond; pre-vet financial checks

Title: Permit delays from local authority
Description: Planning conditions take longer than expected to discharge
MitigationActions: Early engagement with planners; dedicated planning consultant

Title: Design change requests from client
Description: Client may request changes during construction impacting cost/time
MitigationActions: Robust change control; design freeze before key stages

Title: BIM coordination issues causing rework
Description: Late clash detection could cause expensive on-site rework
MitigationActions: Federated model reviews every 2 weeks; Solibri clash reports

Title: Long-lead items delayed
Description: Specialist equipment 20+ week lead time may cause delay
MitigationActions: Early order; secure fabrication slot; alternate suppliers identified

Title: Safety incident causing HSE stoppage
Description: Serious incident could trigger HSE prohibition notice
MitigationActions: ISO 45001 system; daily toolbox talks; independent audits

Title: Cost inflation in materials
Description: Steel/concrete prices volatile in current market
MitigationActions: Fix prices with suppliers at contract award; value engineering

Title: Community objections / complaints
Description: Noise / dust complaints from neighbours could restrict working hours
MitigationActions: Community liaison plan; noise monitoring; communications
